emails.subject: New Units
emails.body: New Units The Bloomfield Station will be exchanging three turbines in 2000. The La Plata Station will be exchanging one unit in 2000. Bloomfield #1001 on 03-06-2000 #1002 on 03-08-2000 #1003 on 03-14-2000 La Plata #1 on 06-07-2000 These units are like for like exchanges. Tracy

emails.subject: Re: New Units
emails.body: Re: New Units Tracy, thanks for the heads up. Beginning in January of 2000, provide me with the new and old serial numbers for each unit and a closer exchange date, as things (scheduling, changeout activities etc.) tend to move dates around. Team San-Juan 05/14/99 09:31 AM
